message:
docs(fp-io): wrap bare URL in doc comment (br-6sus / fd90.72)

Self-review under cargo doc --document-private-items surfaced a
pre-existing rustdoc warning at fp-io/src/lib.rs:435 — a bare URL
in the PANDAS_DEFAULT_NA_VALUES doc comment was flagged as
"this URL is not a hyperlink".

Fix: wrap the URL in angle brackets (<https://...>) so rustdoc
treats it as an autolink. Standard rustdoc convention.

Verified: cargo doc -p fp-io --no-deps --document-private-items
now emits zero warnings (was 1). 429 fp-io tests pass; clippy
-D warnings clean.

This was the only bare URL in any of the 12 workspace crates'
src/lib.rs doc comments — confirmed via:
  grep -rn '^/// .*https://' crates/*/src/lib.rs | grep -v '<https://'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
